title: lepisorus normalis
intro: Lepisorus normalis is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus normalis include reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of various diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Lepisorus normalis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including extracts, teas, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
